recommendations.title: Alone
recommendations.overview: When Pim and Ploy, twins conjoined at the stomach, are separated, the operation leaves Pim the surviving sister, haunted by Ploy's vengeful ghost.

recommendations.title: Pee Mak
recommendations.overview: Mak's friends just want to protect him, but his wife Nak won't let a small thing like her own death get in the way of true love.

recommendations.title: Shutter
recommendations.overview: When Jane and Tun run over a girl in a car accident, they speed away immediately from the crime scene. However, Tun, a photographer, soon discovers strange shadows in his photos, which unsettles them.

recommendations.title: The Medium
recommendations.overview: A shaman's family learn that their goddess is supposedly controlling one of them. However, their lives take a frightening turn when they realise the goddess has nothing to do with the possession.

recommendations.title: Killing Ground
recommendations.overview: A couple's camping trip turns into a frightening ordeal when they stumble across the scene of a horrific crime.

recommendations.title: Hatchet for the Honeymoon
recommendations.overview: A madman haunted by the ghost of his ex-wife carves a corpse-laden trail.

recommendations.title: Evidence
recommendations.overview: Ryan is making a documentary on his friend, Brett, about camping for the first time. However, once they begin camping, they discover that there is a mysterious figure that is hunting them.

recommendations.title: The ABCs of Death
recommendations.overview: An ambitious anthology film featuring segments directed by over two dozen of the world's leading talents in contemporary genre film. Inspired by children's educational ABC books, the film comprises 26 individual chapters, each helmed by a different d
recommendations.director: Bruno Forzani, Hélène Cattet, Adrián García Bogliano, Jon Schnepp, Ernesto Díaz Espinoza, Xavier Gens, Jorge Michel Grau, Yudai Yamaguchi, Banjong Pisanthanakun, Ti West, Jason Eisener, Jake West, Adam Wingard, Timo Tjahjanto, Simon Rumley, Kaare Andrews, Noboru Iguchi, Andrew Traucki, Ben Wheatley, Thomas Cappelen Malling, Marcel Sarmiento, Lee Hardcastle, Yoshihiro Nishimura, Srđan Spasojević, Anders Morgenthaler, Angela Bettis, Nacho Vigalondo

recommendations.title: Tumbbad
recommendations.overview: India, 1918. On the outskirts of Tumbbad, a cursed village where it always rains, Vinayak, along with his mother and his brother, care of a mysterious old woman who keeps the secret of an ancestral treasure that Vinayak gets obsessed with.

recommendations.title: The Spiral
recommendations.overview: A young pathologist seeks answers to the mysterious death of a friend and soon comes into contact with the same cursed videotape that caused the death of the friend's wife and son, which is haunted by the curse of Sadako, a relentless spirit.
